ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "swda_filename" TEXT /* File name of the conversation in the Switchboard Dialogue Act (SWDA) format */,
  "ptb_basename" TEXT /* Base name of the conversation file in the Penn Treebank (PTB) format */,
  "conversation_no" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the conversation */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the main topic discussed in the conversation */,
  "prompt" TEXT /* Prompt or question that initiated the conversation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the conversation in seconds */,
  "transcription_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcription (e.g., pending, completed, error) */,
  "transcription_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcription was last updated */,
  "transcription_method" TEXT /* Method used for transcription (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "transcription_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the transcription (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (e.g., customer service, internal meeting) */,
  "call_department" TEXT /* Department associated with the call (e.g., sales, support) */,
  "call_agent" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who handled the call (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_call_agent FOREIGN KEY ("call_agent") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_topic_description FOREIGN KEY ("topic_description") REFERENCES topics ("topic_description")
)

CREATE TABLE "utterances" (
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utterance */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conversation the utterance belongs to */,
  "transcript_index" INTEGER /* Index of the transcript segment */,
  "act_tag" TEXT /* Tag representing the type of action (e.g., statement, question) */,
  "act_label_1" TEXT /* Primary label for the action (e.g., Statement-non-opinion) */,
  "act_label_2" INTEGER /* Secondary label for the action (if applicable) */,
  "act_label_relation" INTEGER /* Relation between primary and secondary labels (if applicable) */,
  "caller" TEXT /* Identifier for the speaker (e.g., A, B) */,
  "utterance_index" INTEGER /* Index of the utterance within the conversation */,
  "subutterance_index" INTEGER /* Index of the sub-utterance within the utterance */,
  "clean_text" TEXT /* Cleaned text of the utterance */,
  "parse_tree" TEXT /* Parse tree of the utterance */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the transcription for the utterance */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the utterance (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotion detected in the utterance (e.g., happy, sad, angry) */,
  "timestamp_start" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the utterance */,
  "timestamp_end" TEXT /* End timestamp of the utterance */,
  "speaker_role" TEXT /* Role of the speaker (e.g., customer, agent, manager) */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the utterance */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date when the utterance was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utterance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_act_tag FOREIGN KEY ("act_tag") REFERENCES action_tags ("act_tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer service representative, manager, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the conversation */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., specific changes made) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the topic */,
  "topic_category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., customer service, product, technical) */,
  "topic_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of occurrence of the topic across conversations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_tags" (
  "act_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action tag */,
  "act_tag" TEXT /* Tag representing the type of action (e.g., sd, qy) */,
  "act_label_1" TEXT /* Primary label for the action (e.g., Statement-non-opinion) */,
  "act_label_2" INTEGER /* Secondary label for the action (if applicable) */,
  "act_label_relation" INTEGER /* Relation between primary and secondary labels (if applicable) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action tag */,
  "action_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of occurrence of the action tag across conversations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("act_tag_id")
)
